text:
First, note that in 1648, neither Asia/Singapore nor Australia/Sydney had modern time zones.  
But historically, Singapore is around UTC+7:20 (before 1905), and Sydney is around UTC+10:04:52 (pre-1895).  
Difference = UTC+10:04:52 − UTC+7:20 = 2 hours 44 minutes 52 seconds ahead for Sydney.  

1:00 AM + 2h45m ≈ 3:45 AM same date (Feb 20, 1648).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 03:45
